title: Add reconcile flow, e2e checks, docs and handoff
requirements: Add a management command or service path to reconcile source projections by source_code and target memory/analytics/all.
Support dry-run with clear metrics for new, changed, unchanged, deleted, denied and failed objects.
Add e2e for workorder search result and dynamic access denial.
Add e2e or integration test for waiting list pii_off behavior with no PII audit.
Add external test source with pii_guarded behavior if feasible.
Update operator docs and final acceptance report.
acceptance_checks: python manage.py test apps.core.tests apps.memory.tests apps.analytics.tests apps.workorders.tests apps.waiting_list.tests apps.ai.tests
